text:
is an Angel that is original to the Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: Decisive Battle in Tokyo-3 RPG game.

Profile

This Angel is similar to a gigantic jellyfish. Its head has the shape of a bell, and many eyes are all over in it. From the lower part of the head hangs a structure with a rhomboidal shape, and several tentacles start at its side. Its core is not visible, possibly being inside it.

In addition to having a standard A.T. Field, this Angel attacks using its tentacles to catch its enemies and launch them. You can also perform an attack with high-pressure energy bullets.

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: Decisive Battle in Tokyo-3
